title: Nucor to create 200 more jobs in Alabama as it builds a new tower production plant
text: Nucor Corp. NUE, +1.30% said Wednesday that it expects to create 200 full-time jobs in Alabama, as it announced a plan to build a new transmission tower production plant in Decatur, next to its sheet steel mill that is already there. The steel maker's new plant is part of its plan announced in December to invest $270 million to build two new tower production plants.
